strings.abyssea: (windower.ffxi.get_player() and string.format('%s%d/%s%d %d/%dXP (%.0f%%) TNL:%d TNM:%d Merits:%d XP/hr:%.1fk', windower.ffxi.get_player().main_job or 'UNK', windower.ffxi.get_player().main_job_level or 0, windower.ffxi.get_player().sub_job or 'NONE', windower.ffxi.get_player().sub_job_level or 0, xp.current, xp.tnl, (xp.current/xp.tnl)*100, (xp.tnl-xp.current), ((lp.tnm or 10000)-(lp.current or 0)), (lp.number_of_merits or 0), math.floor(xp.rate/100)/10)) or "Loading..."
strings.default: (windower.ffxi.get_player() and string.format('%s%d/%s%d %d/%dXP (%.0f%%) TNL:%d TNM:%d Merits:%d XP/hr:%.1fk', windower.ffxi.get_player().main_job or 'UNK', windower.ffxi.get_player().main_job_level or 0, windower.ffxi.get_player().sub_job or 'NONE', windower.ffxi.get_player().sub_job_level or 0, xp.current, xp.tnl, (xp.current/xp.tnl)*100, (xp.tnl-xp.current), ((lp.tnm or 10000)-(lp.current or 0)), (lp.number_of_merits or 0), math.floor(xp.rate/100)/10)) or "Loading..."
strings.dynamis: (windower.ffxi.get_player() and string.format('%s%d/%s%d %d/%dXP (%.0f%%) TNL:%d TNM:%d Merits:%d XP/hr:%.1fk | 100:%d M.S.:%d L.J.:%d Total:%d', windower.ffxi.get_player().main_job or 'UNK', windower.ffxi.get_player().main_job_level or 0, windower.ffxi.get_player().sub_job or 'NONE', windower.ffxi.get_player().sub_job_level or 0, xp.current, xp.tnl, (xp.current/xp.tnl)*100, (xp.tnl-xp.current), ((lp.tnm or 10000)-(lp.current or 0)), (lp.number_of_merits or 0), math.floor(xp.rate/100)/10, dynamis.hundred_byne or 0, dynamis.m_silver or 0, dynamis.l_jadeshell or 0, (dynamis.hundred_byne or 0) + (dynamis.m_silver or 0) + (dynamis.l_jadeshell or 0))) or "Loading..."
